item.title: SUN PHARMACEUTICAL INDUSTRIES INC: Xyvona (levorphanol tartrate tablets), 3mg, 100 Tablets, Rx only, Forte BioPharma, Recall
item.product: Xyvona (levorphanol tartrate tablets), 3mg, 100 Tablets, Rx only, Forte BioPharma,
item.summary: Labeling: Not Elsewhere Classified. This recall has been initiated in response to the denial by FDA of marketing the product under the proprietary name Xyvona Product details: Xyvona (levorphanol tartrate tablets), 3mg, 100 Tablets, Rx only, Forte BioPharma, Manufactured by: Ohm Laboratories Inc., New Brunswick, NJ 08901, Distributed by: Fort Bio-Pharma, LLC., Las Vegas, NV 89113, NDC 72245-058-10
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
